member.summary: convert BTL "type"+"id" pair to model-level moniker

member.summary: create new ID for object created by provider - these are 'temporary IDs' valid during existence of document/provider only

member.name: T:nxm.msp.core.utils.moniker_mapper
member.summary: foreign model service provider utility part supporting local-foreign moniker mapping

member.summary: universal constructor create 'domestic' moniker for given foreign type/id create foreign object 'id' for given domestic moniker (foreign type is 'assumed'/'known')

member.summary: retrieve domestic moniker for foreign object info

member.summary: retrieve foreign object info for model moniker

member.summary: delegate for generating local ID for given foreign moniker

member.name: T:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_
member.summary:
model service provider for nxm-business-objects
this class should contain all common, generic methods to be potentially overriden in specific places

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_.sync_with_models(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String)
member.summary: update provider's state after changes in model layer and pass changes (recalcs) back

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_._nbo_update_model_document
member.summary: update model-document state using provider's info

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_._nbo_select_objects_to_outdate
member.summary: select model-objects to be marked as 'possibly outdated' using NBO-local version as selection criteria

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_.get_model_object_by_moniker(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.iglobal_moniker,System.UInt32)
member.summary: returns single existing model-object for given moniker

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_.get_model_objects_by_monikers(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker},System.UInt32)
member.summary: Returns a sequence of existing model objects for the given monikers.
member.param: The number of segments to load.
member.returns: An asynchronous enumerable of results containing the model objects.

member.name: M:nxm.msp.nbo.provider.nbo_model_service_provider_base_.__naked_model_object_by_moniker(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.data.model.services.model_service_provider_operation_context,nxm.system.core.data.types.monikers.ilocal_moniker,System.UInt32)
